hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // .filePath // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && command -v prettier &>/dev/null; then case "$FILE" in *.js|*.ts|*.jsx|*.tsx|*.json|*.md|*.css|*.scss) prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && echo '{"feedback": "Auto-formatted with Prettier"}' || echo '{"continue": true}' ;; *) echo '{"continue": true}' ;; esac; else echo '{"continue": true}'; fi

CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'npm install|yarn add|pnpm add'; then echo '{"feedback": "Dependencies changed. Consider running tests."}'; else echo '{"continue": true}'; fi
